title: MaaS Multi-Tenancy — Per-Tenant Gateway and Identity Isolation

ac_list.text: Admin can create a new tenant with name, description, and dedicated namespace allocation
Each tenant has isolated identity realm with cross-tenant data isolation enforced at the gateway level
Tenants can generate long-lived API keys scoped to their namespace for programmatic model access
Tenant overview page shows resource usage, model count, and active user sessions
Admin can grant or revoke model access for a tenant from the shared model catalog
Tenant settings page allows editing name, description, and namespace quota limits
Admin can delete a tenant with confirmation dialog listing resources that will be cleaned up
Documentation for tenant management API endpoints and RBAC configuration is available
